text:
Created attachment 175010
Updated to include the growfs patch

I've added two files:

files/patch-cloudinit_config_cc__resizefs.py
files/patch-tools_build-on-freebsd

I am not sure that the second is required because that file is not used, but it was part of the original patch on launchpad.
